blueprint.name: Auto Lights
blueprint.description: Automatically turn lights on and off based on binary sensors (motion sensors, door sensors, etc.), with an optional control switch to enable or disable the automation.
input.lights.name: Lights
input.sensors.name: Sensors
input.sensors.description: Binary sensors that trigger the lights (motion sensors, door/window sensors, etc.).
input.off_delay.name: Turn off delay
input.off_delay.description: Time to wait before turning off the lights after a sensor becomes inactive.
input.ignore_open_doors.name: Ignore open doors
input.ignore_open_doors.description: When enabled (default), open door/window sensors do not prevent lights from turning off — only motion/presence sensors are checked. When disabled, lights stay on as long as any sensor (including doors) remains active.
input.control_entity.name: Control switch (optional)
input.control_entity.description: An input_boolean that enables or disables the automation. When turned on, the automation resumes and reacts to sensors. When turned off, the automation stops responding. Leave empty to always keep the automation active.
